Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20101 0 0}{f 5 21 1 103}Oh, hey, it's you again! Thanks for always coming by![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 103}Looks like my takoyaki has completely captured your heart... or should I say, stomach?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 103}You do look really pale... You should probably go home and get some rest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 103}It'd be bad for business if you ate my takoyaki and then passed out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 103}My takoyaki is both delicious and cheap! How about some?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 103}Whoa, you look pale. You should probably go home and get some rest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 103}It'd be bad for business if you ate my takoyaki and then passed out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20105 0 0}{f 5 21 1 103}Go get some rest. Then come back and eat some takoyaki when you're feeling better.[n]{f 1 1}
